summary: Tested pause/resume trip tracking feature for mileage tracking. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed - Pause and Resume buttons work correctly, status indicators update properly, and visual styling (amber for paused, green for tracking) is implemented correctly.

pause_trip_api.details: Successfully pauses active trip, returns paused_at timestamp

resume_trip_api.details: Successfully resumes paused trip, calculates total_paused_duration

pause_button_ui.details: Amber/orange button appears when trip is active, triggers pause action

resume_button_ui.details: Green button appears when trip is paused, triggers resume action

paused_status_indicator.details: Amber 'Paused' badge shows in section header when trip is paused

tracking_status_indicator.details: Green 'Tracking' badge with pulse animation shows when trip is active

paused_trip_info_panel.details: Panel shows amber background, 'Trip Paused' text, and message about GPS tracking paused

location_not_recorded_when_paused.details: API returns 'Trip is paused, location not recorded' when trying to update location while paused

test_credentials.login_method: Enter code '4399' in email field on /login page

seed_data_creation: Created test trips via API for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pause/Resume trip tracking feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/mileage/pause-trip and POST /api/admin/mileage/resume-trip. Frontend buttons have data-testid attributes: pause-tracking-btn and resume-tracking-btn. The MileageTrackingSection.jsx component handles isPaused state correctly.
